basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Mangalagiri (AIIMS Mangalagiri)
basic_details.post_name: Project Research Scientist I (Medical) and Project Technical Support II (Field investigator)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Mangalagiri (AIIMS Mangalagiri) has published the Project Research Scientist – I (Medical) and Other Posts Recruitment 2026 notification. The recruitment drive aims to fill 3 contractual positions. Candidates meeting the prescribed age limits (maximum 35 years for Project Research Scientist–I and maximum 30 years for Technical Support–II) and possessing the required educational qualifications and experience can apply through email on or before 09-08-2026. Eligible candidates will be called for the walk-in interview scheduled on 11-08-2026. The official n

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years for Scientist I, Max 30 years for Technical Support II
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for All Posts: 35 years. Upper age limit may be relaxed as per Govt. of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS or equivalent, Graduate degree in Epidemiology, Public Health, Medico-Social work or equivalent, 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/DMLT/Engineering) + Five Years Experience
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist I (Medical): MBBS or equivalent Project Technical Support II (Field investigator): Graduate degree in Epidemiology, Public Health, Medico-Social work, or equivalent + two years' experience Project Technical Support II (Lab Technician): 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/DMLT/Engineering) + Five Years' Experience

salary_details.details: Project Research Scientist I (Medical): Rs. 67,000/- + HRA admissible, Rs. 20,000/- + HRA Project Technical Support II (Field investigator): Rs. 67,000/- + HRA admissible, Rs. 20,000/- + HRA Project Technical Support II (Lab Technician): Rs. 67,000/- + HRA admissible, Rs. 20,000/- + HRA

selection_process: Interview Document Verification Written Test (if number of candidates is more)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Mangalagiri Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Mangalagiri Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Mangalagiri Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Research Scientist I (Medical): MBBS or equivalent Project Technical Support II (Field investigator): Graduate degree in Epidemiology, Public Health, Medico-Social work, or equivalent + two years' experience Project Technical Support II (Lab Technician): 12th in Science + Diploma (MLT/DMLT/Engineering) + Five Years' Experience

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit for All Posts: 35 years. Upper age limit may be relaxed as per Govt. of India rules.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Project Research Scientist I (Medical): Rs. 67,000/- + HRA admissible, Rs. 20,000/- + HRA Project Technical Support II (Field investigator): Rs. 67,000/- + HRA admissible, Rs. 20,000/- + HRA Project Technical Support II (Lab Technician): Rs. 67,000/- + HRA admissible, Rs. 20,000/- + HRA

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Interview Document Verification Written Test (if number of candidates is more)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Mangalagiri Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: AIIMS Mangalagiri has announced a total of 3 vacancies for various posts, including Project Research Scientist – I (Medical), Project Technical Support – II (Field investigator), and Project Technical Support – II (Lab Technician). This provides multiple opportunities for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting applications via email for AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026 is 09 August 2026. Candidates are advised to complete their application process well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for AIIMS Mangalagiri Various Posts?
faq.answer: The mode of application for AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026 is entirely through email. Applicants need to prepare their bio-data and attach self-attested copies of required documents before sending them to the official email address.

faq.question: Q4. What are the eligibility criteria for Project Research Scientist – I (Medical) post?
faq.answer: For the Project Research Scientist – I (Medical) post, candidates must possess an MBBS or equivalent degree. Detailed eligibility for other posts like Technical Support is also available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts in AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026 is 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable for reserved categories as per the Government of India rules and regulations.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for Project Research Scientist – I (Medical) at AIIMS Mangalagiri?
faq.answer: The salary for Project Research Scientist – I (Medical) is Rs. 67,000/- plus HRA admissible. Other posts like Project Technical Support – II also offer competitive salaries, as detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned for AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026 for any category, including General/OBC and SC/ST candidates. This makes it accessible for all eligible applicants.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026 primarily involves an Interview and Document Verification. A Written Test may also be conducted if a large number of candidates apply for the positions.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the important links section provided in this article. It is crucial to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of AIIMS Mangalagiri?
faq.answer: The official website for All India Institute of Medical Sciences Mangalagiri is www.aiimsmangalagiri.edu.in. Candidates can visit the website for more information and updates regarding this recruitment and other announcements.
